retry_reason: kref_get always succeeds; no failure path, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This wrapper acquires an additional reference on a c4iw_wr_wait object by incrementing its kref. The caller must ensure the object is alive (the WARN_ON validates that the refcount is not zero before the increment). After the call, the caller holds a new reference that must be paired with a corresponding call to kref_put (or similar) to release it. There are no lock or RCU requirements for this operation.
